title: Gap since previous event (user 1)
prompt: For user 1 only, return each event with the number of minutes since their previous event (NULL for the first). Columns: event_id, event_name, minutes_since_prev. Order by event_at, then event_id.

generic: date_diff('minute', LAG(event_at) OVER (ORDER BY event_at, event_id), event_at)

hints: LAG(event_at) OVER (ORDER BY event_at, event_id) gives the previous timestamp.
date_diff('minute', prev, current) gives the gap; the first row’s LAG is NULL.
